summary: Publication metadata and local-fetch sources; the PDF is not redistributed by this repository.
paper_title: Learning Transferable Visual Models From Natural Language Supervision
verified_caption: CLIP jointly trains an image encoder and a text encoder to predict correct image-text pairings, then uses text embeddings of class descriptions as a zero-shot classifier at inference time.
